## Summary

Describe the changes and why they are needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] npm run typecheck
- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run test
- [ ] npm run build

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs/examples when needed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I verified no breaking API change was introduced.
